hero.headline: Claude Code 如何从命令行助手，长成知识工作的代理平台
hero.subheadline: 这不是一串版本号，而是一条从研究预览、平台化到无人值守协作的能力演进线。

milestones.title: 研究预览上线
milestones.summary: Claude Code 正式进入公众视野，首次定义“agentic coding assistant”的产品形态。
milestones.why_it_matters: 这是整个叙事的起点。产品不是从 IDE 插件起步，而是从可主动完成任务的代理式体验起步。

evidence.title: Introducing Claude 3.7 Sonnet and Claude Code
evidence.summary: Anthropic launches Claude Code research preview alongside Claude 3.7 Sonnet. Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that can autonomously handle complex coding tasks.

milestones.title: 官方方法论成形
milestones.summary: Anthropic 开始公开总结如何把 Claude Code 用成真正的工作流，而不只是聊天工具。
milestones.why_it_matters: 方法论的出现意味着产品开始从少数极客的技巧，变成更可复制的工作方式。

evidence.title: Best Practices for Agentic and Claude Code
evidence.summary: Anthropic publishes official best practices guide for using Claude Code effectively in agentic workflows.

highlights.raw: Improved thinking triggering reliability

milestones.title: 正式可用
milestones.summary: Claude Code 从研究预览迈入正式产品阶段。
milestones.why_it_matters: 这不仅是商业阶段变化，也意味着更稳定的发布节奏、用户预期和产品承诺。

highlights.raw: Claude Code is now generally available
Introducing Sonnet 4 and Opus 4 models

milestones.title: SDK 发布
milestones.summary: Claude Code 不再只是产品本身，也开始成为别的工作流和应用的底层能力。
milestones.why_it_matters: 这标志着平台化起点，意味着能力可以被嵌入到更广的系统和团队流程中。

evidence.title: Introducing the Claude Code SDK
evidence.summary: Developers can now build custom agent workflows on top of Claude Code with the new SDK.

highlights.raw: Released TypeScript SDK: import @anthropic-ai/claude-code to get started
Released Python SDK: pip install claude-code-sdk to get started

milestones.title: Hooks 发布
milestones.summary: Claude Code 获得可编排、可触发、可嵌入的事件接口。
milestones.why_it_matters: 从这个节点开始，Claude Code 不只是一个会话界面，而是可以接入企业与个人自动化体系的事件引擎。

highlights.raw: Released hooks. Special thanks to community input in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/712. Docs: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/hooks
highlights.summary: 发布钩子功能，支持工作流定制

highlights.raw: Hooks: Enabled optional timeout configuration for each command
Fixed a bug where MCP tools would display twice in tool list
Hooks: Split Stop hook triggering into Stop and SubagentStop
highlights.summary: 优化停止钩子触发逻辑

highlights.raw: Windows: OAuth uses port 45454 and properly constructs browser URL
highlights.summary: 修复Windows OAuth登录和浏览器URL

highlights.raw: Hooks: Added UserPromptSubmit hook and the current working directory to hook inputs

milestones.title: 原生 Windows 支持
milestones.summary: Claude Code 开始走出 macOS / Unix 开发者圈层，进入更广泛的办公设备环境。
milestones.why_it_matters: 平台可达性是走向大众知识工作者的前提。原生 Windows 支持降低了企业与非技术团队的采用门槛。

highlights.raw: Settings: /doctor can now help you identify and fix invalid setting files
Windows: OAuth uses port 45454 and properly constructs browser URL
highlights.summary: 修复Windows OAuth登录和浏览器URL

highlights.raw: Shell: Switch to in-memory shell snapshot to fix file-related errors
highlights.summary: 修复shell快照文件相关错误

highlights.raw: Hooks: Added UserPromptSubmit hook and the current working directory to hook inputs
Windows: Fixed file search, @agent mentions, and custom slash commands functionality

milestones.title: 自定义子代理出现
milestones.summary: 工作开始可以被拆给多个专门代理并行处理。
milestones.why_it_matters: 这让 Claude Code 从“单线程专家”变成“多角色协作系统”，对管理型和复杂项目型工作尤其重要。

highlights.raw: You can now create custom subagents for specialized tasks! Run /agents to get started
highlights.summary: 支持创建自定义子代理执行专项任务

highlights.raw: Tab to toggle thinking (sticky across sessions)
highlights.summary: 思考模式切换跨会话保留

highlights.raw: Add subagents dynamically with `--agents` flag
Plan mode: introduced new Plan subagent
Subagents: claude can now choose to resume subagents
Subagents: claude can dynamically choose the model used by its subagents

milestones.title: Claude Code 2.0
milestones.summary: 2.0 将产品从“强大 CLI”推进到“更高层次的工作代理平台”。
milestones.why_it_matters: 这是一次认知层级的跃迁，也给后续插件、桌面、远程控制和更广场景奠定了基础。

evidence.title: Claude Code 2.0
evidence.summary: Major version upgrade powered by Claude Opus 4.5. Introduces subagents for parallel development, higher-level code understanding.

highlights.raw: Tab to toggle thinking (sticky across sessions)
highlights.summary: 思考模式切换跨会话保留

highlights.raw: SDK: The Claude Code SDK is now the Claude Agent SDK
Add subagents dynamically with `--agents` flag

milestones.title: 插件系统发布
milestones.summary: 插件市场让 Claude Code 从可配置工具进一步变成可分发、可扩展的平台。
milestones.why_it_matters: 这决定了生态增长速度，也意味着团队可以沉淀自己的工作方式并分发给别人。

highlights.raw: **Plugin System Released**: Extend Claude Code with custom commands, agents, hooks, and MCP servers from marketplaces
highlights.summary: 发布插件系统扩展能力

highlights.raw: `/plugin install`, `/plugin enable/disable`, `/plugin marketplace` commands for plugin management
Repository-level plugin configuration via `extraKnownMarketplaces` for team collaboration
Fix @-mentioning MCP servers to toggle them on/off
Improve permission checks for bash with inline env vars
highlights.summary: 改进bash环境变量权限检查

highlights.raw: Plugins UI polish

milestones.title: 桌面入口出现
milestones.summary: Claude Code 不再只属于终端熟练用户，开始获得更接近日常工作台的入口。
milestones.why_it_matters: 更直观的入口会直接影响大众用户的可接近性，也是后续 Cowork 和 Remote Control 的铺垫。

highlights.raw: Introducing Claude Code for Desktop: https://claude.com/download

milestones.title: 后台代理开始常驻工作
milestones.summary: Claude Code 开始真正承担“你在做别的事时，它继续工作”的角色。
milestones.why_it_matters: 这让产品从交互式助手开始接近持续型代理，直接改变知识工作者对时间分配的感受。

highlights.raw: Added background agent support. Agents run in the background while you work
highlights.summary: 后台代理支持，无需等待

highlights.raw: Fixed background agent results returning raw transcript data instead of the agent's final answer (anthropics/claude-code#26012)
highlights.summary: 修复后台代理返回错误数据

highlights.raw: Use `ctrl+f` to kill all background agents instead of double-pressing ESC. Background agents now continue running when you press ESC to cancel the main thread, giving you more control over agent lifecycle.
highlights.summary: 后台agent生命周期控制优化

highlights.raw: Fixed background tasks failing in git worktrees due to remote URL resolution reading from worktree-specific gitdir instead of the main repository config (anthropics/claude-code#26065)
highlights.summary: 修复Git工作树后台任务失败

milestones.title: Cowork 扩圈到更广知识工作
milestones.summary: Claude Code 的代理能力开始被重新包装给更广泛的知识工作场景。
milestones.why_it_matters: 这是“从开发工具走向知识工作平台”的最重要信号之一，对新网站定位尤其关键。

evidence.title: Introducing Cowork
evidence.summary: Cowork extends Claude Code's agent capabilities to non-developers. Supports file system access, multi-step tasks, connector integrations, and browser access.

evidence.title: Cowork – AI that can operate on your computer (Anthropic)
Cowork: Claude Code for the rest of your work

highlights.raw: Fixed plugins with git submodules not being fully initialized when installed
highlights.summary: 修复Git子模块插件初始化

highlights.raw: Enabled MCP tool search auto mode by default for all users. When MCP tool descriptions exceed 10% of the context window, they are automatically deferred and discovered via the MCPSearch tool instead of being loaded upfront. This reduces context usage for users with many MCP tools configured. Users can disable this by adding `MCPSearch` to `disallowedTools` in their settings.
Added `showTurnDuration` setting to hide turn duration messages (e.g., "Cooked for 1m 6s")
highlights.summary: 添加隐藏转回耗时消息选项

highlights.raw: [VSCode] Added ability for OAuth users to browse and resume remote Claude sessions from the Sessions dialog
highlights.summary: OAuth用户可浏览和恢复远程会话

highlights.raw: [IDE] Fixed a race condition on Windows where the Claude Code sidebar view container would not appear on start
highlights.summary: 修复Windows启动时侧边栏不显示

highlights.raw: [VSCode] Added native plugin management support

milestones.title: Sonnet 4.6 与 1M 上下文
milestones.summary: Claude Code 的长上下文能力进入新的量级，能容纳更重的资料和更长的任务链。
milestones.why_it_matters: 对知识工作者来说，更长上下文往往比更多按钮更重要，它直接影响复杂任务是否能持续推进。

evidence.title: Claude Sonnet 4.6
evidence.summary: Claude Sonnet 4.6 with 1M token context window (beta). Claude Code users prefer it 70% over Sonnet 4.5. Becomes default model for Free/Pro plans.

highlights.raw: Improved memory usage for shell commands that produce large output — RSS no longer grows unboundedly with command output size
highlights.summary: 修复大输出内存无限增长问题

highlights.raw: Fixed unbounded WASM memory growth during long sessions by periodically resetting the tree-sitter parser
Fixed unbounded memory growth during long-running sessions caused by Yoga WASM linear memory never shrinking
Sonnet 4.5 with 1M context is being removed from the Max plan in favor of our frontier Sonnet 4.6 model, which now has 1M context. Please switch in /model.
Fixed a memory leak where LSP diagnostic data was never cleaned up after delivery, causing unbounded memory growth in long sessions

Fixed a bug where resumed sessions could be invisible when the working directory involved symlinks, because the session storage path was resolved at different times during startup. Also fixed session data loss on SSH disconnect by flushing session data before hooks and analytics in the graceful shutdown sequence.
highlights.summary: 修复符号链接会话丢失和SSH断连数据丢失

highlights.raw: Fixed memory leak where completed task state objects were never removed from AppState
highlights.summary: 应用状态任务内存泄漏修复

milestones.title: Claude Code Security
milestones.summary: 安全审查与治理能力被单独产品化，Claude Code 开始承担更高信任级别的工作。
milestones.why_it_matters: 这是进入企业和高风险场景的关键门槛，也让整个产品故事不止于效率，而是延伸到可信执行。

evidence.title: Introducing Claude Code Security
evidence.summary: Claude Code Security understands component interactions like a human security researcher. Tracks data flow, detects complex vulnerabilities, multi-stage validation filters false positives.

highlights.raw: Fixed a memory leak where LSP diagnostic data was never cleaned up after delivery, causing unbounded memory growth in long sessions

Fixed a bug where resumed sessions could be invisible when the working directory involved symlinks, because the session storage path was resolved at different times during startup. Also fixed session data loss on SSH disconnect by flushing session data before hooks and analytics in the graceful shutdown sequence.
highlights.summary: 修复符号链接会话丢失和SSH断连数据丢失

highlights.raw: Linux: Fixed native modules not loading on systems with glibc older than 2.30 (e.g., RHEL 8)
Fixed `/security-review` command failing with `unknown option merge-base` on older git versions
Fixed `permissions.defaultMode` settings values other than `acceptEdits` or `plan` being applied in Claude Code Remote environments — they are now ignored
highlights.summary: 修复远程环境权限设置应用

milestones.title: 远程控制与跨设备协作
milestones.summary: Claude Code 的使用场景开始脱离本地终端，进入跨设备、远程和更轻量的入口。
milestones.why_it_matters: 这是从“专业工作台”继续走向“随手可用的工作界面”的一步，对泛知识工作者吸引力很大。

highlights.raw: Fixed a crash in the WebAssembly interpreter on Linux x64 & Windows x64
Fixed graceful shutdown sometimes leaving stale sessions when using Remote Control by parallelizing teardown network calls
highlights.summary: 修复远程控制关闭时留下过期会话

highlights.raw: Fixed `--worktree` sometimes being ignored on first launch
highlights.summary: 修复首次启动worktree参数被忽略

highlights.raw: Expand Remote Control to more users
highlights.summary: 扩展远程控制功能用户范围

highlights.raw: Added policy limit fetching (e.g., remote control restrictions) for Team plan OAuth users, not just Enterprise
Fixed teammates accidentally spawning nested teammates via the Agent tool's `name` parameter
highlights.summary: 修复Agent工具嵌套生成问题

highlights.raw: Fixed memory retention in in-process teammates where the parent's full conversation history was pinned for the teammate's lifetime, preventing GC after `/clear` or auto-compact
highlights.summary: 修复队友对话历史内存锁定

highlights.raw: Fixed `API Error: 400 This model does not support the effort parameter` when using custom Bedrock inference profiles or other model identifiers not matching standard Claude naming patterns
highlights.summary: 修复自定义模型effort参数错误

highlights.raw: Improved compaction to preserve images in the summarizer request, allowing prompt cache reuse for faster and cheaper compaction
highlights.summary: 优化图像保留加速缓存复用

highlights.raw: Reduced Remote Control `/poll` rate to once per 10 minutes while connected (was 1–2s), cutting server load ~300×. Reconnection is unaffected — transport loss immediately wakes fast polling.

milestones.title: Loop 与 Cron，无人值守正式成形
milestones.summary: 定时执行和循环任务让 Claude Code 更像可持续运行的数字同事。
milestones.why_it_matters: 这条能力线直接对应知识工作者最愿意外包的工作类型: 巡检、跟进、提醒、批处理与重复汇总。

highlights.raw: Fixed macOS keychain corruption when using multiple OAuth MCP servers. Large OAuth metadata blobs could overflow the `security -i` stdin buffer, silently leaving stale credentials behind and causing repeated `/login` prompts.
highlights.summary: 修复macOS钥匙串溢出导致反复登录

highlights.raw: Fixed sandbox prompting users to approve non-allowed domains when `allowManagedDomainsOnly` is enabled in managed settings — non-allowed domains are now blocked automatically with no bypass
highlights.summary: 修复非允许域名自动阻止机制

highlights.raw: Fixed interactive tools (e.g., `AskUserQuestion`) being silently auto-allowed when listed in a skill's allowed-tools, bypassing the permission prompt and running with empty answers
highlights.summary: 修复交互工具权限绕过漏洞

highlights.raw: Fixed `/security-review` command failing with `unknown option merge-base` on older git versions
Fixed `permissions.defaultMode` settings values other than `acceptEdits` or `plan` being applied in Claude Code Remote environments — they are now ignored
highlights.summary: 修复远程环境权限设置应用

highlights.raw: Fixed skill listing being re-injected on every `--resume` (~600 tokens saved per resume)

evidence.title: 60-year-old developer rekindled passion by Claude Code

highlights.raw: Fixed background agent completion notifications missing the output file path, which made it difficult for parent agents to recover agent results after context compaction
highlights.summary: 修复后台智能体结果恢复缺路径

highlights.raw: Added `/loop` command to run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. `/loop 5m check the deploy`)
highlights.summary: 添加循环命令执行功能

highlights.raw: Added cron scheduling tools for recurring prompts within a session

capabilities.name: 规划与推理工作流
capabilities.summary: 从一次性回答升级为可分阶段规划、探索与执行的工作方式。
capabilities.description: 这条能力线覆盖 plan mode、thinking、explore、模型 effort 等机制，决定 Claude Code 能否像搭档一样先想清楚再动手。

samples.raw: Fixed API 400 errors ("thinking blocks cannot be modified") that occurred in sessions with concurrent agents, caused by interleaved streaming content blocks preventing proper message merging.
samples.summary: 修复并发agent流冻结

samples.raw: Fixed a bug where `/context` would sometimes fail with "max_tokens must be greater than thinking.budget_tokens" error message
samples.summary: 修复/context令牌错误

samples.raw: Fixed `API Error: 400 This model does not support the effort parameter` when using custom Bedrock inference profiles or other model identifiers not matching standard Claude naming patterns
samples.summary: 修复自定义模型effort参数错误

samples.raw: Re-introduced the "ultrathink" keyword to enable high effort for the next turn
samples.summary: 恢复ultrathink关键词

capabilities.name: 执行与工作区操作
capabilities.summary: Claude Code 从读代码走向能在真实工作区中稳定执行多步任务。
capabilities.description: 这条能力线描述它如何获得文件、命令、差异查看和任务执行能力，决定它是否能从建议者变成执行者。

samples.raw: Fixed "Always allow" on multiline bash commands creating invalid permission patterns that corrupt settings (anthropics/claude-code#25909)
samples.summary: 修复权限规则损坏设置文件

samples.raw: Fixed a command injection vulnerability in bash command processing where malformed input could execute arbitrary commands
samples.summary: 修复bash命令注入漏洞

samples.raw: Fixed memory leak in bash command prefix cache
samples.summary: 修复bash命令前缀缓存内存泄漏

samples.raw: Fixed an issue where bash commands with backslash-newline continuation lines (e.g., long commands split across multiple lines with `\`) would produce spurious empty arguments, potentially breaking command execution.
samples.summary: 修复反斜杠续行命令解析错误

capabilities.name: 记忆与长上下文
capabilities.summary: Claude Code 逐步具备更长的任务记忆、更稳的会话延续与更大的上下文吞吐。
capabilities.description: 这条能力线决定它能否理解长期项目、复杂上下文和跨轮次协作，对知识工作者尤为关键。

samples.raw: Fixed memory leak in git root detection cache that could cause unbounded growth in long-running sessions
samples.summary: 修复git根目录检测缓存无限增长

samples.raw: Fixed memory leak in JSON parsing cache that grew unbounded over long sessions
samples.summary: 修复JSON解析缓存无限增长

samples.raw: Fixed a memory leak where LSP diagnostic data was never cleaned up after delivery, causing unbounded memory growth in long sessions
samples.summary: 修复LSP诊断内存泄漏

samples.raw: Fixed unbounded WASM memory growth during long sessions by periodically resetting the tree-sitter parser
samples.summary: 修复长会话WASM内存溢出

capabilities.name: 自动化与无人值守
capabilities.summary: Claude Code 开始承担持续运行、定时触发和后台完成的工作。
capabilities.description: 这条能力线决定产品是否能从助手进化为代理人，覆盖后台任务、队列消息、loop、cron、通知与长时间运行稳定性。

samples.raw: Fixed background agent completion notifications missing the output file path, which made it difficult for parent agents to recover agent results after context compaction
samples.summary: 修复后台智能体结果恢复缺路径

samples.raw: Fixed background agent results returning raw transcript data instead of the agent's final answer (anthropics/claude-code#26012)
samples.summary: 修复后台代理返回错误数据

samples.raw: Fixed Ctrl+C and ESC being silently ignored when background agents are running and the main thread is idle. Pressing twice within 3 seconds now kills all background agents.
samples.summary: 修复后台运行时快捷键失效

samples.raw: Use `ctrl+f` to kill all background agents instead of double-pressing ESC. Background agents now continue running when you press ESC to cancel the main thread, giving you more control over agent lifecycle.
samples.summary: 后台agent生命周期控制优化

capabilities.name: 委派与协作
capabilities.summary: 工作逐渐可以拆给多个子代理、团队成员和远端入口协同完成。
capabilities.description: 这条能力线体现 Claude Code 从单线程助手演进为可委派、可并行、可恢复的协作系统。

samples.raw: Fixed background agent completion notifications missing the output file path, which made it difficult for parent agents to recover agent results after context compaction
samples.summary: 修复后台智能体结果恢复缺路径

samples.raw: Fixed `--print` hanging forever when team agents are configured — the exit loop no longer waits on long-lived `in_process_teammate` tasks
samples.summary: 修复--print配置团队智能体卡死

samples.raw: Fixed Agent Teams teammates failing on Bedrock, Vertex, and Foundry by propagating API provider environment variables to tmux-spawned processes (anthropics/claude-code#23561)
samples.summary: 修复多云平台Agent Teams支持

samples.raw: Fixed forked conversations (`/fork`) sharing the same plan file, which caused plan edits in one fork to overwrite the other
samples.summary: 修复fork计划冲突

capabilities.name: 连接器与生态扩展
capabilities.summary: Claude Code 从单体工具扩展为连接外部系统、插件、技能与 SDK 的平台。
capabilities.description: 这条能力线描述 MCP、插件、技能、hooks 和 SDK 如何让产品进入更广的工作流生态。

samples.raw: Fixed macOS keychain corruption when using multiple OAuth MCP servers. Large OAuth metadata blobs could overflow the `security -i` stdin buffer, silently leaving stale credentials behind and causing repeated `/login` prompts.
samples.summary: 修复macOS钥匙串溢出导致反复登录

samples.raw: Fixed MCP OAuth token refresh race condition when running multiple Claude Code instances simultaneously
samples.summary: 修复MCP OAuth刷新竞态条件

samples.raw: Fixed `disableAllHooks` setting to respect managed settings hierarchy — non-managed settings can no longer disable managed hooks set by policy (#26637)
samples.summary: 修复托管设置安全策略绕过

samples.raw: Fixed security issue where sensitive data (OAuth tokens, API keys, passwords) could be exposed in debug logs
samples.summary: 修复日志敏感数据泄露

capabilities.name: 多模态与交互界面
capabilities.summary: 输入输出方式从纯终端文本扩展到图片、PDF、语音、桌面与远程界面。
capabilities.description: 这条能力线决定非程序员是否能更自然地使用 Claude Code，也是 Apple 风格前端最值得视觉化的一条主线。

samples.raw: Fixed the Read tool putting oversized images into context when image processing failed, breaking subsequent turns in long image-heavy sessions
samples.summary: 修复图片处理破坏上下文

samples.raw: Fixed a crash in the WebAssembly interpreter on Linux x64 & Windows x64
samples.summary: 修复WebAssembly解释器崩溃

samples.raw: Fixed Agent Teams teammates failing on Bedrock, Vertex, and Foundry by propagating API provider environment variables to tmux-spawned processes (anthropics/claude-code#23561)
samples.summary: 修复多云平台Agent Teams支持

samples.raw: Fixed Agent Teams using wrong model identifier for Bedrock, Vertex, and Foundry customers
samples.summary: 修复Agent Teams模型标识符

capabilities.name: 安全、权限与治理
capabilities.summary: 随着能力增强，Claude Code 也持续补强权限、安全审计与企业治理。
capabilities.description: 这条能力线让产品更适合真实组织环境，包含 permission、sandbox、trust、policy、security review 与审计事件。

samples.raw: Fixed macOS keychain corruption when using multiple OAuth MCP servers. Large OAuth metadata blobs could overflow the `security -i` stdin buffer, silently leaving stale credentials behind and causing repeated `/login` prompts.
samples.summary: 修复macOS钥匙串溢出导致反复登录

samples.raw: Fixed sandbox prompting users to approve non-allowed domains when `allowManagedDomainsOnly` is enabled in managed settings — non-allowed domains are now blocked automatically with no bypass
samples.summary: 修复非允许域名自动阻止机制

samples.raw: Fixed interactive tools (e.g., `AskUserQuestion`) being silently auto-allowed when listed in a skill's allowed-tools, bypassing the permission prompt and running with empty answers
samples.summary: 修复交互工具权限绕过漏洞

samples.raw: Fixed a security issue where `statusLine` and `fileSuggestion` hook commands could execute without workspace trust acceptance in interactive mode.
samples.summary: 修复hook命令信任校验安全漏洞

personas.name: 研究者
personas.summary: 需要处理大量资料、网页、PDF 和长上下文，并将信息转成结构化洞察。
jobs_to_be_done: 快速理解陌生主题与资料集合
在网页、PDF、笔记和代码间切换上下文
把探索过程沉淀成可复用的方法

sample_changes.raw: Fixed the Read tool putting oversized images into context when image processing failed, breaking subsequent turns in long image-heavy sessions
sample_changes.summary: 修复图片处理破坏上下文

sample_changes.raw: Fixed a crash in the WebAssembly interpreter on Linux x64 & Windows x64
sample_changes.summary: 修复WebAssembly解释器崩溃

sample_changes.raw: Fixed API 400 errors ("thinking blocks cannot be modified") that occurred in sessions with concurrent agents, caused by interleaved streaming content blocks preventing proper message merging.
sample_changes.summary: 修复并发agent流冻结

sample_changes.raw: Fixed a bug where `/context` would sometimes fail with "max_tokens must be greater than thinking.budget_tokens" error message
sample_changes.summary: 修复/context令牌错误

personas.name: 写作者
personas.summary: 更关注整理思路、迭代表达、语音输入和跨文档持续写作。
jobs_to_be_done: 把零散输入整理成结构化初稿
在长文写作中保持上下文连续
用更自然的交互方式推进创作

milestones.title: Loop 与 Cron，无人值守正式成形

sample_changes.raw: Fixed the Read tool putting oversized images into context when image processing failed, breaking subsequent turns in long image-heavy sessions
sample_changes.summary: 修复图片处理破坏上下文

sample_changes.raw: Fixed a bug where `/context` would sometimes fail with "max_tokens must be greater than thinking.budget_tokens" error message
sample_changes.summary: 修复/context令牌错误

sample_changes.raw: Fixed memory leak in git root detection cache that could cause unbounded growth in long-running sessions
sample_changes.summary: 修复git根目录检测缓存无限增长

sample_changes.raw: Fixed memory leak in JSON parsing cache that grew unbounded over long sessions
sample_changes.summary: 修复JSON解析缓存无限增长

personas.name: 内容工作者
personas.summary: 需要同时处理素材、草稿、截图和多种输入方式，希望体验更像数字工作台而不是终端工具。
jobs_to_be_done: 管理不同格式的素材输入
把想法和素材快速组合成输出
在桌面和远程场景下保持工作连续

milestones.title: Cowork 扩圈到更广知识工作
远程控制与跨设备协作

sample_changes.raw: Fixed the Read tool putting oversized images into context when image processing failed, breaking subsequent turns in long image-heavy sessions
sample_changes.summary: 修复图片处理破坏上下文

sample_changes.raw: Fixed background agent completion notifications missing the output file path, which made it difficult for parent agents to recover agent results after context compaction
sample_changes.summary: 修复后台智能体结果恢复缺路径

sample_changes.raw: Fixed memory leak in git root detection cache that could cause unbounded growth in long-running sessions
sample_changes.summary: 修复git根目录检测缓存无限增长

sample_changes.raw: Fixed memory leak in JSON parsing cache that grew unbounded over long sessions
sample_changes.summary: 修复JSON解析缓存无限增长

personas.name: 项目经理
personas.summary: 关注计划、拆解、跨工具协作和周期性跟进，希望 AI 能像执行型项目助理。
jobs_to_be_done: 把复杂任务拆解成可执行计划
协调多个子任务并持续跟踪
让例行检查和汇总自动化运行

milestones.title: Loop 与 Cron，无人值守正式成形

sample_changes.raw: Fixed background agent completion notifications missing the output file path, which made it difficult for parent agents to recover agent results after context compaction
sample_changes.summary: 修复后台智能体结果恢复缺路径

sample_changes.raw: Fixed background agent results returning raw transcript data instead of the agent's final answer (anthropics/claude-code#26012)
sample_changes.summary: 修复后台代理返回错误数据

sample_changes.raw: Fixed forked conversations (`/fork`) sharing the same plan file, which caused plan edits in one fork to overwrite the other
sample_changes.summary: 修复fork计划冲突

sample_changes.raw: Fixed Ctrl+C and ESC being silently ignored when background agents are running and the main thread is idle. Pressing twice within 3 seconds now kills all background agents.
sample_changes.summary: 修复后台运行时快捷键失效

personas.name: 运营与分析
personas.summary: 更在乎可靠执行、批量操作、长任务稳定性和跨系统连接。
jobs_to_be_done: 执行重复性或批量性的工作
让任务在后台稳定运行并可追踪
在权限边界内连接多个系统

milestones.title: 后台代理开始常驻工作

sample_changes.raw: Fixed background agent completion notifications missing the output file path, which made it difficult for parent agents to recover agent results after context compaction
sample_changes.summary: 修复后台智能体结果恢复缺路径

sample_changes.raw: Fixed macOS keychain corruption when using multiple OAuth MCP servers. Large OAuth metadata blobs could overflow the `security -i` stdin buffer, silently leaving stale credentials behind and causing repeated `/login` prompts.
sample_changes.summary: 修复macOS钥匙串溢出导致反复登录

sample_changes.raw: Fixed MCP OAuth token refresh race condition when running multiple Claude Code instances simultaneously
sample_changes.summary: 修复MCP OAuth刷新竞态条件

sample_changes.raw: Fixed a security issue where `statusLine` and `fileSuggestion` hook commands could execute without workspace trust acceptance in interactive mode.
sample_changes.summary: 修复hook命令信任校验安全漏洞

personas.name: 团队负责人
personas.summary: 需要把个人效率工具升级为团队协作系统，同时确保权限和治理可控。
jobs_to_be_done: 把工作委派给不同代理或团队成员
在组织内建立可复用的工作方法
平衡效率、透明度与安全性

sample_changes.raw: Fixed `--print` hanging forever when team agents are configured — the exit loop no longer waits on long-lived `in_process_teammate` tasks
sample_changes.summary: 修复--print配置团队智能体卡死

sample_changes.raw: Fixed `disableAllHooks` setting to respect managed settings hierarchy — non-managed settings can no longer disable managed hooks set by policy (#26637)
sample_changes.summary: 修复托管设置安全策略绕过

sample_changes.raw: Fixed Agent Teams teammates failing on Bedrock, Vertex, and Foundry by propagating API provider environment variables to tmux-spawned processes (anthropics/claude-code#23561)
sample_changes.summary: 修复多云平台Agent Teams支持

sample_changes.raw: Fixed background agent completion notifications missing the output file path, which made it difficult for parent agents to recover agent results after context compaction
sample_changes.summary: 修复后台智能体结果恢复缺路径

official_posts.title: Introducing Claude 3.7 Sonnet and Claude Code
official_posts.summary: Anthropic launches Claude Code research preview alongside Claude 3.7 Sonnet. Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that can autonomously handle complex coding tasks.

official_posts.title: Best Practices for Agentic and Claude Code
official_posts.summary: Anthropic publishes official best practices guide for using Claude Code effectively in agentic workflows.

official_posts.title: Introducing the Claude Code SDK
official_posts.summary: Developers can now build custom agent workflows on top of Claude Code with the new SDK.

official_posts.title: Claude Code 2.0
official_posts.summary: Major version upgrade powered by Claude Opus 4.5. Introduces subagents for parallel development, higher-level code understanding.

official_posts.title: Introducing Cowork
official_posts.summary: Cowork extends Claude Code's agent capabilities to non-developers. Supports file system access, multi-step tasks, connector integrations, and browser access.

official_posts.title: Claude Sonnet 4.6
official_posts.summary: Claude Sonnet 4.6 with 1M token context window (beta). Claude Code users prefer it 70% over Sonnet 4.5. Becomes default model for Free/Pro plans.

official_posts.title: Introducing Claude Code Security
official_posts.summary: Claude Code Security understands component interactions like a human security researcher. Tracks data flow, detects complex vulnerabilities, multi-stage validation filters false positives.

items.brief: 研究预览上线的首屏视觉。优先使用官方发布页或公告页中的主视觉，备选为时间轴式封面图。
表现“方法论成形”的卡片视觉。可以是博客封面、关键词卡片或流程示意图。
展示 Claude Code 接入其他工作流的生态图，突出 SDK 作为平台起点。
用于正式可用阶段的简洁标识，可设计成产品成熟度徽章。
展示 hooks 触发链路的流程图，让非技术用户也能理解其价值。
表现产品跨平台扩展的画面，优先展示 Windows 原生界面或安装/运行场景。
一张能表现任务被多个子代理分工处理的图，适合做产品能力跨越的视觉节点。
Claude Code 2.0 的视觉节点，可使用版本升级封面或抽象大版本转折感的海报图。
插件市场或插件管理界面的截图，体现平台生态。
表现“你继续工作时，它在后台运行”的概念图，可用多层卡片或时间流样式表达。
桌面版或下载页相关视觉，表达更低门槛、更贴近日常工作台的入口。
Cowork 的主视觉，应突出“从开发到更广知识工作”的转折。
展示 1M 上下文的能力量级，可用抽象数据图或卷轴式上下文视觉。
安全审查/权限治理相关视觉，强调可信与企业使用场景。
远程控制或跨设备使用场景图，适合表现产品从工作台走向随手可用的入口。
展示 loop 和 cron 的循环执行路径，让用户直观看到无人值守能力。

notes: 里程碑、角色和视觉资产为 editorial 配置。
能力、角色样本和社交信号由规则从 release/blog/HN 数据自动派生。
社交信号以 HN 标题和热度为主，尚未引入评论内容级分析。
